tools.context:
212;helped Microsoft expand a government business empire worth billions of
dollars.
Tags: cloud computing , cybersecurity , Microsoft , national security po

behavioral_patterns.value:
Documentation evasion leading to regulatory approval bypass

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Fail to provide proper detailed security documentation
  • Step 2: Leave security posture assessment incomplete
  • Step 3: Receive regulatory approval despite documentation failures
  • Step 4: Expand government business operations

Detection: Monitor for regulatory approvals granted with unusual conditions or 'buyer beware' notices, especially when documentation requirements are not fully met
behavioral_patterns.context: Documentation evasion leading to regulatory approval bypass

behavioral_patterns.value:
Cobbled product deployment without security mapping

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Assemble product by linking together existing network-enabled applications
  • Step 2: Deploy without creating documentation of information flows
  • Step 3: Apply encryption inconsistently without documentation
  • Step 4: Unable to provide security flow charts when requested

Detection: Look for cloud services that cannot provide clear data flow diagrams or encryption mapping documentation when audited
behavioral_patterns.context: Cobbled product deployment without security mapping

behavioral_patterns.value:
Developer account termination without notification

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Implement new account verification system
  • Step 2: Terminate developer accounts without prior warning
  • Step 3: Provide no explanation for termination
  • Step 4: Block appeals process
  • Step 5: Later blame victims for paperwork issues

Detection: Monitor for patterns of developer account suspensions without proper notification processes, especially targeting security software developers

Hyperconvergence strategy creating single point of failure

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Push migration of servers and storage to single cloud provider
  • Step 2: Convert communication systems to single vendor
  • Step 3: Consolidate file storage and collaboration tools
  • Step 4: Create dependency where service hiccups stop all work

Detection: Identify organizations with excessive dependency on single cloud provider where outages cause complete work stoppage
behavioral_patterns.context: Hyperconvergence strategy creating single point of failure

-- KTLYST Detection Rules
-- Generated from 9 rules
-- ============================================

-- Rule 1: Detect Domain: www.propublica.org
-- ID: IOC-DOMAIN-d2e5213e
-- Generation: template (pending)
-- Description: Detects domain indicator 'www.propublica.org' extracted from threat intelligence.
-- ------------------------------------------------------------
-- Domain Detection Rule: www.propublica.org
-- Source: 2889-2907
-- Type: Domain pattern match (mode: subdomain)
-- Apex Domain: www.propublica.org


SELECT
    transaction_id,
    user_id,
    recipient_domain,
    sender_domain,
    transaction_url,
    created_at,
    'www.propublica.org' AS matched_indicator,
    '2889-2907' AS source_span
FROM transactions
WHERE (
    recipient_domain LIKE '%www.propublica.org%' OR sender_domain LIKE '%www.propublica.org%' OR transaction_url LIKE '%www.propublica.org%'
)
AND created_at >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

compiled_outputs.sentinel:
// KTLYST Detection Rules (KQL for Microsoft Sentinel)
// Generated: 11 rules from 11 indicators
// ============================================================

// Rule 1: IOC Detection - www.propublica.org
// Source: Page 1
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "www.propublica.org"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 2: IOC Detection - www.theregister.com
// Source: Page 2
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "www.theregister.com"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 3: IOC Detection - www.pcgamer.com
// Source: Page 2
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "www.pcgamer.com"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 4: IOC Detection - michelf.ca
// Source: Page 3
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "michelf.ca"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 5: IOC Detection - https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/09/microsoft_d
// Source: Page 2
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/09/microsoft_dev_account_deactivations/"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 6: IOC Detection - https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/microsoft-claims-
// Source: Page 2
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/microsoft-claims-wireguard-and-veracrypt-account-termination-wa"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 7: IOC Detection - https://michelf.ca/projects/php-markdown/extra/
// Source: Page 3
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "https://michelf.ca/projects/php-markdown/extra/"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 8: Behavioral Detection - Documentation evasion leading to regulatory approval bypass
// Category: defense_evasion
// Source: Page 1
// MITRE: T1562
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference", "DisableRealtimeMonitoring", "-ep bypass")
    or FileName in~ ("reg.exe", "attrib.exe")
| summarize EventCount = count(),
    UniqueCommands = dcount(ProcessCommandLine),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, AccountName
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 9: Behavioral Detection - Cobbled product deployment without security mapping
// Category: impact
// Source: Page 1
// MITRE: T1027.013
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ActionType == "FileModified"
| where FileName endswith_cs ".encrypted" or FileName matches regex @"\.[a-z]{5,8}$"
| summarize ModifiedCount = count(),
    UniqueExtensions = dcount(FileName),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where ModifiedCount >= 50
| sort by ModifiedCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 10: Behavioral Detection - Developer account termination without notification
// Category: credential_access
// Source: Page 1
// MITRE: 
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100

// Rule 11: Behavioral Detection - Hyperconvergence strategy creating single point of failure
// Category: credential_access
// Source: Page 1
// MITRE: 
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100
compiled_outputs.splunk:
``` KTLYST Detection Rules (SPL for Splunk)
``` Generated: 11 rules from 11 indicators

``` Rule 1: IOC Detection - www.propublica.org
``` Source: Page 1
index=main sourcetype=network "www.propublica.org"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 2: IOC Detection - www.theregister.com
``` Source: Page 2
index=main sourcetype=network "www.theregister.com"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 3: IOC Detection - www.pcgamer.com
``` Source: Page 2
index=main sourcetype=network "www.pcgamer.com"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 4: IOC Detection - michelf.ca
``` Source: Page 3
index=main sourcetype=network "michelf.ca"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 5: IOC Detection - https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/09/microsoft_d
``` Source: Page 2
index=main sourcetype=network "https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/09/microsoft_dev_account_deactivations/"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 6: IOC Detection - https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/microsoft-claims-
``` Source: Page 2
index=main sourcetype=network "https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/microsoft-claims-wireguard-and-veracrypt-account-termination-wa"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count

``` Rule 7: IOC Detection - https://michelf.ca/projects/php-markdown/extra/
``` Source: Page 3
index=main sourcetype=network "https://michelf.ca/projects/php-markdown/extra/"
| stats count as hit_count, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, user
| where hit_count >= 1
| sort -hit_count
| table src_ip, dest_ip, user, hit_count, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 8: Behavioral Detection - Documentation evasion leading to regulatory approval bypass
``` Category: defense_evasion
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: T1562
index=main sourcetype=endpoint:process (process_command_line="*Set-MpPreference*" OR process_command_line="*DisableRealtimeMonitoring*" OR process_command_line="*-ep bypass*")
| stats count as event_count, dc(process_command_line) as unique_cmds, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by dest, user
| sort -event_count
| table dest, user, event_count, unique_cmds, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 9: Behavioral Detection - Cobbled product deployment without security mapping
``` Category: impact
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: T1027.013
index=main sourcetype=endpoint:filesystem action=modified (file_name="*.encrypted" OR file_name="*.locked")
| stats count as modified_count, dc(file_name) as unique_extensions, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by dest, process_name
| where modified_count >= 50
| sort -modified_count
| table dest, process_name, modified_count, unique_extensions, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 10: Behavioral Detection - Developer account termination without notification
``` Category: credential_access
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE:

| stats count as failed_count, dc(src_ip) as unique_ips, earliest(_time) as first_attempt, latest(_time) as last_attempt by user
| where failed_count >= 5 OR unique_ips >= 3
| sort -failed_count
| table user, failed_count, unique_ips, first_attempt, last_attempt

``` Rule 11: Behavioral Detection - Hyperconvergence strategy creating single point of failure
``` Category: credential_access
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: 
index=main sourcetype=authentication action=failure

# Generated: 11 rules from 11 indicators
# Convert to platform-native with: sigma convert -t <target>
---

title: 'KTLYST - www.propublica.org'
id: bba8f40c-c66d-50d9-a5d4-9bbc0a6e8ea0
status: experimental
description: |
    Auto-generated detection rule.

level: medium
author: KTLYST
date: 2026/03/24
references:
